capabilities: Apply a specialized code refactoring strategy by leveraging agent-based tool selection to optimize for domain-specific constraints and ensure error-free execution.

procedure.action: Execute the refactoring strategy using agent-selected tools by invoking the toolchain with domain-specific parameters; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code to the audit trail by capturing execution metrics from the toolchain and storing them in a centralized logging system using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Reapply the refactoring strategy with adjusted parameters if initial validation fails, using agent feedback to refine tool selection; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.

Assert the refactored code output by running domain-specific test suites and comparing results against baseline metrics; log discrepancies to the audit trail by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Continuously monitor refactoring outcomes by setting up alerts for operation_duration_ms exceeding predefined thresholds and investigate anomalies promptly using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Implement a specialized code refactoring strategy by integrating agent-based tool selection, ensuring domain-specific constraints are met and results are validated.
title: Specialized Code Refactoring Strategy

failureConditions: Refactoring errors occur when agent-selected tools do not align with domain constraints, causing incorrect code transformations.
Performance degradation when operation_duration_ms exceeds acceptable limits due to inefficient tool selection, impacting system responsiveness.
Audit trail inconsistencies when logging mechanisms fail, causing incomplete tracking of refactoring operations and hindering traceability.
metrics: the refactored code output by running domain-specific test suites and comparing results against baseline metrics
all operations have corresponding entries in audit trail
successConditions: log completeness: assert all operations have corresponding entries in audit trail
